name: @prune/mcp-proxy
description: E1 — Cross-Vendor Lazy-Schema MCP Proxy. Sits between an MCP host (Cursor, Codex CLI, Cline, Continue, Aider) and one or more MCP servers; intercepts the JSON-RPC handshake to return only the tools matching the current intent. Schemas load lazily on first reference. Composes @prune/router (classifier) + @prune/sentinel (injection shield on dynamically-loaded schemas). No regex; rule-based verb classifier; fail-safe-to-include.
